notes: Solid, feature-complete Asteroids implementation with UFO, hyperspace, wave progression, audio, and high score persistence; minor quirk with lives display showing lives-1 instead of current lives count, and invulnerability blink logic could be smoother.

An exceptionally well-crafted Asteroids clone with synthesized Web Audio sound effects, complete game loop, and accurate mechanics, though it lacks the slight ship friction of the original arcade game and misses diagonal corner wrapping.

A solid and mostly complete Asteroids clone with proper waves, UFOs, hyperspace, scoring, lives, pause/title/game-over flow, and no obvious crash bugs, but it is not flawless due to some authenticity/UX roughness like nonstandard key choices, simplistic title point icons, and a few implementation quirks.
